diagnosis1Query: SELECT LineCode, LineTitle, [Number of Visits by Diagnosis Regardless of Primacy (a)] as col1, [Number of Patients with Diagnosis (b)] as col2, CAST([Visits Per Patient] AS DECIMAL(4, 2)) as col3 FROM  (SELECT [LineCode],[LineTitle] ,[ColumnTitle]  ColumnName,[Value] FROM [OPHC].[dbo].[OPHC_VW_RUP_GetWebReportsData_2022] where TableName = 'tableNameValue' and FundingStream = 'Universal' and [State] = 'StateValueParameter' and LineTitle in ( 'Symptomatic/Asymptomatic human immunodeficiency virus (HIV)', 'Tuberculosis','Sexually transmitted infections', 'Hepatitis B','Hepatitis C'	,'Novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) disease'	,'Post COVID-19 condition'	,'Asthma','Chronic lower respiratory diseases'	,'Acute respiratory illness due to,novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) disease'	,'Abnormal breast findings, female','Abnormal cervical findings'	,'Diabetes mellitus'	,'Heart disease (selected)'	,'Hypertension','Contact dermatitis and other eczema'	,'Dehydration','Exposure to heat or cold'	,'Overweight and obesity','Otitis media and Eustachian tube disorders','Selected perinatal/neonatal medical conditions','Lack of expected normal physiological development (such as delayed milestone, failure to gain weight, failure to thrive); nutritional deficiencies in children only. Does not include sexual or mental development.'	,'Alcohol-related disorders'	,'Other substance-related disorders (excluding tobacco use disorders)','Tobacco use disorder'	,'Depression and other mood disorders'	,'Anxiety disorders, including post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD)'	,'Attention deficit and disruptive behavior disorders'	,'Other mental disorders, excluding drug or alcohol dependence'	,'Human trafficking'	,'Intimate partner violence')) AS SourceTable  PIVOT  (  Max(Value)  FOR ColumnName IN (  [Number of Visits by Diagnosis Regardless of Primacy (a)], [Number of Patients with Diagnosis (b)], [Visits Per Patient])) AS PivotTable order by 1
diagnosis2Query: SELECT LineCode, LineTitle,   [Number of Visits (a)] as col1, [Number of Patients (b)] as col2, CAST([Visits Per Patient] AS DECIMAL(4, 2)) as col3 FROM  (SELECT [LineCode]		,[LineTitle]      ,[ColumnTitle]  ColumnName,[Value] FROM [OPHC].[dbo].[OPHC_VW_RUP_GetWebReportsData_2022] where TableName = 'tableNameValue' and FundingStream = 'Universal' and [State] = 'StateValueParameter' and LineTitle in ('HIV test'	,'Hepatitis B test'	,'Hepatitis C test'	,'Novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) diagnostic test','Novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) antibody test','Pre-Exposure Prophylaxis (PrEP)-associated management of all patients on PrEP'	,'Mammogram','Pap test'	,'Selected immunizations: hepatitis A; haemophilus influenzae B (HiB); pneumococcal, diphtheria, tetanus, pertussis (DTaP) (DTP) (DT); measles, mumps, rubella (MMR); poliovirus; varicella; hepatitis B'	,'Seasonal flu vaccine','Coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) vaccine','Contraceptive management'	,'Health supervision of infant or child (ages 0 through 11)','Childhood lead test screening (9 to 72 months)'	,'Screening, Brief Intervention, and Referral to Treatment (SBIRT)','Smoke and tobacco use cessation counseling	','Comprehensive and intermediate eye exams	','Emergency services	','Oral exams	','Prophylaxis?adult or child	','Sealants','Fluoride treatment?adult or child	','Restorative services	','Oral surgery (extractions and other surgical procedures)'	,'Rehabilitative services (Endo, Perio, Prostho, Ortho)	')) AS SourceTable  PIVOT  (  Max(Value)  FOR ColumnName IN (  [Number of Visits (a)], [Number of Patients (b)], [Visits Per Patient])  ) AS PivotTable order by 1
diagnosis1LALQuery: SELECT LineCode, LineTitle, [Number of Visits by Diagnosis Regardless of Primacy (a)] as col1, [Number of Patients with Diagnosis (b)] as col2, CAST([Visits Per Patient] AS DECIMAL(4, 2)) as col3 FROM  (SELECT [LineCode],[LineTitle] ,[ColumnTitle]  ColumnName,[Value] FROM [OPHC].[dbo].[OPHC_VW_RUP_GetLALWebReportsData_2022] where TableName = 'tableNameValue' and FundingStream = 'Universal' and [State] = 'StateValueParameter' and LineTitle in ( 'Symptomatic/Asymptomatic human immunodeficiency virus (HIV)', 'Tuberculosis','Sexually transmitted infections', 'Hepatitis B','Hepatitis C'	,'Novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) disease'	,'Post COVID-19 condition'	,'Asthma','Chronic lower respiratory diseases'	,'Acute respiratory illness due to,novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) disease'	,'Abnormal breast findings, female','Abnormal cervical findings'	,'Diabetes mellitus'	,'Heart disease (selected)'	,'Hypertension','Contact dermatitis and other eczema'	,'Dehydration','Exposure to heat or cold'	,'Overweight and obesity','Otitis media and Eustachian tube disorders','Selected perinatal/neonatal medical conditions','Lack of expected normal physiological development (such as delayed milestone, failure to gain weight, failure to thrive); nutritional deficiencies in children only. Does not include sexual or mental development.'	,'Alcohol-related disorders'	,'Other substance-related disorders (excluding tobacco use disorders)','Tobacco use disorder'	,'Depression and other mood disorders'	,'Anxiety disorders, including post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD)'	,'Attention deficit and disruptive behavior disorders'	,'Other mental disorders, excluding drug or alcohol dependence'	,'Human trafficking'	,'Intimate partner violence')) AS SourceTable  PIVOT  (  Max(Value)  FOR ColumnName IN (  [Number of Visits by Diagnosis Regardless of Primacy (a)], [Number of Patients with Diagnosis (b)], [Visits Per Patient])) AS PivotTable order by 1
diagnosis2LALQuery: SELECT LineCode, LineTitle,   [Number of Visits (a)] as col1, [Number of Patients (b)] as col2, CAST([Visits Per Patient] AS DECIMAL(4, 2)) as col3 FROM  (SELECT [LineCode]		,[LineTitle]      ,[ColumnTitle]  ColumnName,[Value] FROM [OPHC].[dbo].[OPHC_VW_RUP_GetLALWebReportsData_2022] where TableName = 'tableNameValue' and FundingStream = 'Universal' and [State] = 'StateValueParameter' and LineTitle in ('HIV test'	,'Hepatitis B test'	,'Hepatitis C test'	,'Novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) diagnostic test','Novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) antibody test','Pre-Exposure Prophylaxis (PrEP)-associated management of all patients on PrEP'	,'Mammogram','Pap test'	,'Selected immunizations: hepatitis A; haemophilus influenzae B (HiB); pneumococcal, diphtheria, tetanus, pertussis (DTaP) (DTP) (DT); measles, mumps, rubella (MMR); poliovirus; varicella; hepatitis B'	,'Seasonal flu vaccine','Coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) vaccine','Contraceptive management'	,'Health supervision of infant or child (ages 0 through 11)','Childhood lead test screening (9 to 72 months)'	,'Screening, Brief Intervention, and Referral to Treatment (SBIRT)','Smoke and tobacco use cessation counseling	','Comprehensive and intermediate eye exams	','Emergency services	','Oral exams	','Prophylaxis?adult or child	','Sealants','Fluoride treatment?adult or child	','Restorative services	','Oral surgery (extractions and other surgical procedures)'	,'Rehabilitative services (Endo, Perio, Prostho, Ortho)	')) AS SourceTable  PIVOT  (  Max(Value)  FOR ColumnName IN (  [Number of Visits (a)], [Number of Patients (b)], [Visits Per Patient])  ) AS PivotTable order by 1
napApplicationCombinedQuery: SELECT [ZCTA_CODE] as ZCTA, [TOTPOP] as [Pop: Total (#) 2018-2022] , ACSG_200FPL_POP as [Pop: Low-Income (#) 2018-2022], PEN_TP_COMB as [HCP: Penetration of Total Population (%)], PEN_LOWI_COMB as [HCP: Penetration of Low-Income (%)], USERS_ALL_COMB as [HCP: Total Patients (#) 2023],  TOT_GRANTEES_COMB as [HCP: Health Center Count 2023], DOM1_NAME_COMB as [HCP: Dominant Health Center 2023] FROM [UDS_Mapper].[dbo].[UM_ZCTA] where ZCTA_CODE in (zctaValues)
napApplicationAwardeesQuery: SELECT [ZCTA_CODE] as ZCTA, [TOTPOP] as [Pop: Total (#) 2018-2022], ACSG_200FPL_POP as [Pop: Low-Income (#) 2018-2022], PEN_TP_330 as [HCP: Penetration of Total Population (%)], PEN_LOWI_330 as [HCP: Penetration of Low-Income (%)], USERS_330 as [HCP: Total Patients (#) 2023], GRANTEES_330 as [HCP: Health Center Count 2023], DOM1_GRANTEENAME_330 as [HCP: Dominant Health Center 2023] FROM [UDS_Mapper].[dbo].[UM_ZCTA] where ZCTA_CODE in (zctaValues)

mchbIndividualLayerGridQuery: SELECT top topColumnsValue STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD as [County FIPS Code],REGION_ID as [HRSA Region], STATE_NM as [State], LIST_BOX_COUNTY_NM as [County],columnNames, NCHS_URBAN_RURAL_DESC as [NCHS Urban-Rural Classification], NCHS_URBAN_RURAL_CD as [NCHS Urban-Rural Code] FROM [MCHB].[gisapp].[tablename]
mchbTribalLandsDataQuery: select ILD_NM_LSAD as [American Indian and Alaska Native Land Name],ILD_CLASS_FIPS_DESC as [FIPS Desc.],ILD_FUNC_STAT_DESC as [ILD Func. Desc.],ILD_GEO_ID as [ILD ID] from [HRSAGEO].[gisapp].[GEO_INDIANLANDS_GEN_CUR_MVX]
mchbCountiesDataQuery: SELECT  [COUNTY_NM] as [County],[STATE_NAME] as [State],[STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD] as [County FIPS Code] FROM [HRSAGEO].[gisapp].[GEO_COUNTY_GEN_CUR_TX]
mchbnchsurbanruralDataQuery: select [STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD] as [County FIPS Code],[REGION_ID] as [HRSA Region] ,[STATE_NM] as [State],[LIST_BOX_COUNTY_NM] as [County],[NCHS_URBAN_RURAL_DESC] as [NCHS Urban-Rural Classification] ,[NCHS_URBAN_RURAL_CD] as [NCHS Urban-Rural Code] from [MCHB].[gisapp].[tablename]
ruralHealthClinicDataQuery: select [CMS_PROVIDER_STATE_ABBR] as [State],[CMS_PROVIDER_CITY] as [City],[CMS_PROVIDER_ADDRESS] as [Address], [CMS_PROVIDER_ZIP_CD] as [ZIP Code],[CMS_PROVIDER_CAT_DESC] as [Provider Desc.],[FACILITY_NM] as [Facility Name] from [HRSAGEO].[gisapp].[CMS_RHC_DET_CUR_MVX]
ryanAidsDataQuery: select [STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD] as [County FIPS Code],[REGION_ID] as [HRSA Region],[STATE_NM] as [State], [LIST_BOX_COUNTY_NM] as [County],[SITE_NM] as [Site Name],[SITE_ADDRESS_LINE1] as [Address] from [MCHB].[gisapp].[MCHB_MAO_HAB_SVC_SITE]
nhscDataQuery: select [STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD] as [County FIPS Code],[REGION_iD] as [HRSA Region],[STATE_NM] as [State], [LIST_BOX_COUNTY_NM] as [County],[CITY] as [CITY], [ADDRESS_LINE1] as [Address],[SITE_NM] as [Site Name],[SITE_PROGRAM_STATUS] as [Site Program Status] from [MCHB].[gisapp].[MCHB_MAP_BHW_WO_HLTH_SITE]
miechvRecordsQuery: select count(*) as [Count] from [MCHB].[gisapp].[MCHB_MAP_MIECHV_SVC_AREA] a inner join [MCHB].[gisapp].[tablename] b on a.STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD=b.STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD where a.year='2023'
miechvDataQuery: select a.STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD as [County FIPS Code],a.REGION_ID as [HRSA Region],a.STATE_NM as [State],a.LIST_BOX_COUNTY_NM as [County],b.NCHS_URBAN_RURAL_DESC as [NCHS Urban-Rural Classification],b.NCHS_URBAN_RURAL_CD as [NCHS Urban-Rural Code]  from [MCHB].[gisapp].[MCHB_MAP_MIECHV_SVC_AREA] a inner join [MCHB].[gisapp].[tablename] b on a.STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD=b.STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD where a.year='2023'
healthStartServiceAreasRecordsQuery: select count(*) as [Count] from [MCHB].[gisapp].[MCHB_MAP_MIECHV_SVC_AREA] a inner join [MCHB].[gisapp].[MCHB_MAP_MULTI_SEARCH_EXTERNAL_YR_VX_] b on a.STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD=b.STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD where a.year='2023'
healthStartServiceAreasDataQuery: select a.STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD as [County FIPS Code],a.REGION_ID as [HRSA Region],a.STATE_NM as [State],a.LIST_BOX_COUNTY_NM as [County],b.NCHS_URBAN_RURAL_DESC as [NCHS Urban-Rural Classification],b.NCHS_URBAN_RURAL_CD as [NCHS Urban-Rural Code]  from [MCHB].[gisapp].[MCHB_MAP_MIECHV_SVC_AREA] a inner join [MCHB].[gisapp].[MCHB_MAP_MULTI_SEARCH_EXTERNAL_YR_VX_] b on a.STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD=b.STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD where a.year='2023'
hrsaGrantsHighNeedQuery: SELECT OBJECTID AS OBJECTID, AWARD_YR AS [Award Year], FA AS [Award/Funding Amount], GRANTEE_ADDRESS AS [Grantee Address], GRANTEE_CITY AS [Grantee City], GRANTEE_COUNTY_NM AS [Grantee County], GRANTEE_NM AS [Grantee Name], STATE_NM AS [Grantee State], GRANT_NUM AS [Grant Number], GRANT_PROJ_PERIOD_START_DT_TXT AS [Grant Project Start Date], GRANT_PROJ_PERIOD_END_DT_TXT AS [Grant Project End Date], HGDW_ORG_CD AS [Bureau/Organization Code], HGDW_ORG_NM AS [Bureau/Organization Name], STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD AS [County FIPS Codes], X AS [X], Y AS [Y] FROM PUBLISHED.GISAPP.EHB_HRSAGRANTS_DET_CUR_MVX

[CRE County Value (0 Risk)],CRE_1_2_RISK_RATE AS [CRE County Value (1-2 Risks)],CRE_3PLUS_RISK_RATE   AS [CRE County Value (3 Plus Risks)],CRE_0_RISK_NAT_AVG AS [CRE National Value (0 AS [IRR Year],IRR_TOPIC_AREA AS [IRR FROM GISSAPP.HE_COMPREHENSIVE_COUNTY
healthCenterDeliverySitesHighNeedQuery: SELECT OBJECTID AS OBJECTID, SITE_NM AS [Health Center County], GRANT_NUM AS [Grant Number], GRANTEE_NM AS [Grantee Name], SITE_ADDRESS AS [Health Center Setting Desc], SITE_CITY AS [Health Center Desc], SITE_STATE_ABBR AS [Health Center Type], HCC_LOC_SETTING_DESC AS [Health Center Address], HCC_STATUS_DESC AS [Health Center City], HCC_TYP_DESC AS [Health Center Name], COUNTY_NM AS [Health Center State], CMN_STATE_COUNTY_FIPS_CD AS [County FIPS Code], X AS [X], Y AS [Y] FROM  PUBLISHED.GISAPP.SITE_HCC_DET_CUR_VX
